note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo frantically researches Dr. Baeza's disappearance on his encrypted laptop. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo reviews surveillance footage of Dr. Baeza's lab, searching for anomalies. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he ponders the true purpose of Dr. Baeza's mysterious experiment. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he considers the implications of Dr. Baeza's research on human brain activity Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo's growing dread solidifies as he nears the isolated research facility Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Mateo receives a cryptic message from an unknown sender about Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he ponders the implications of Dr. Baeza's cryptic warnings. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he nears the isolated research facility Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo ponders the implications of Dr. Baeza's cryptic warning about Marina. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he nears the lottery-rigged town, suspecting a sinister connection. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo's anxiety spikes as he ponders the lottery's true purpose and Dr. Baeza's cryptic warnings. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo receives a cryptic message from an unknown number, foreshadowing the sinister forces awaiting him in Robledo. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo's anxiety grows as he nears the isolated research facility. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo's search for Zoë yields a cryptic message hinting at her involvement with Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Road to Robledo") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
